title: Field Trip to Niagara Falls
titleZh: 尼亚加拉大瀑布实地考察
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo takes Benjamin's class to Niagara Falls, where he becomes a hero and watches a teacher find her lost love! 🌊

q.en: Where does Benjamin's class go on their field trip?
q.zh: 本杰明的班级去哪里进行实地考察？

explain.en: Geronimo misreads the blackboard, but it actually says CLASS TRIP TO NIAGARA FALLS, and he ends up taking the whole class there.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩看错了黑板，其实上面写的是“班级去尼亚加拉大瀑布考察”，结果他带着全班去了那里。

q.en: Who is Benjamin's teacher on the trip?
q.zh: 这次旅行中本杰明的老师是谁？

explain.en: Miss Angel Paws is Benjamin's teacher; she has blonde fur, blue eyes, and organizes the Niagara Falls field trip.
explain.zh: 安琪儿·爪老师是本杰明的老师；她有着金色毛发、蓝眼睛，正是她组织了尼亚加拉大瀑布的考察之旅。

q.en: How many round-trip tickets did Miss Angel Paws book?
q.zh: 安琪儿·爪老师订了多少张往返票？

explain.en: She booked 'twenty-two students, a teacher, and Geronimo Stilton' — that makes twenty-four round-trip tickets.
explain.zh: 她订的是“二十二名学生、一位老师和杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿”，加起来正好是二十四张往返票。

q.en: When Geronimo could not set up the tents, who did he call for help?
q.zh: 当杰罗尼摩搭不起帐篷时，他打电话向谁求助？

explain.en: Benjamin whispers to call Aunt Thea; after a phone call, all the tents are ready in half an hour because Thea loves a challenge.
explain.zh: 本杰明悄悄建议打电话给蒂奥阿姨；通完电话半小时后所有帐篷就搭好了，因为蒂奥最喜欢挑战。

q.en: What black-and-white animal crept into camp and made everything stink?
q.zh: 哪种黑白相间的小动物溜进营地，把四周弄得臭烘烘？

explain.en: Benjamin checks the tourist guide and shows the picture: the smelly black-and-white creature is a skunk.
explain.zh: 本杰明翻旅游指南，指着图片说那只又臭又黑的黑白小动物就是臭鼬。

q.en: What boat took the class close to the rushing falls?
q.zh: 是哪艘船载着全班靠近奔腾的瀑布？

options.en: The Cheese Express according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 奶酪特快号（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Miss Angel Paws boards the class on a boat called the Maid of the Mist that sails right up to the base of the falls.
explain.zh: 安琪儿·爪老师带全班登上了一艘叫“雾中少女号”的船，它一直开到瀑布脚下。

q.en: Who fell into the icy water and was rescued by Geronimo?
q.zh: 是谁掉进冰冷的水里，被杰罗尼摩救了上来？

explain.en: Punk Rat was left on shore, slipped on a wet rock, and tumbled into the whirlpool; Geronimo dove in and pulled him up by the tail.
explain.zh: 朋克鼠被落在岸上，踩到湿石头滑进漩涡；杰罗尼摩跳下水，抓住他的尾巴把他拉了上来。

q.en: What does Miss Angel Paws keep inside the locket around her neck?
q.zh: 安琪儿·爪老师挂在脖子上的小盒里装着什么？

options.en: A love letter according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一封情书（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A whisker from her lost love
options.zh: 她失去的恋人的一根胡须

explain.en: She opens her locket to show a whisker — all she has left of a mouse she loved and lost long ago.
explain.zh: 她打开小盒，里面是一根胡须——那是她很久以前失去的恋人留给她的全部纪念。

q.en: During the woods hike, what disaster broke out after a little bird started smoking?
q.zh: 在树林里徒步时，一只小鸟开始冒烟后，发生了什么灾难？

options.en: An earthquake according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一场地震（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Someone had left a campfire burning; the smoke filled the air and Gentle Mouse cried 'THE FOREST IS ON FIRE!'
explain.zh: 有人忘了熄灭火堆；浓烟弥漫开来，温柔鼠大喊“森林着火了！”

q.en: How did Geronimo's sister Thea deliver the wedding dress and tuxedo?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的妹妹蒂奥是用什么方式送来婚纱和礼服的？

options.en: In a pink car according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用一辆粉色汽车（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Thea, who loves pink, flies a pink helicopter dropping almonds, invitations, roses, and a huge pink package with the wedding clothes.
explain.zh: 最爱粉色的蒂奥驾驶一架粉色直升机，投下杏仁、请柬、玫瑰，还有装着结婚礼服的巨大粉色包裹。
